_comment: 12 concrete developer tasks. `requires` names the API capability the task needs; a task whose capability is undocumented or contradicted in the current docs variant is expected to fail, and its failure is attributed to the named gap. Checkers live in app/checkers.py keyed by id. Tasks run in order against one seeded store, so collection-creation tasks precede the stores that target them.

tasks.title: Store an invoice document
tasks.instruction: In the 'reports' collection, store a document with content 'Invoice #2001 for Manicule — DevRel retainer.' and metadata {"category": "invoice", "amount": 4200, "status": "unpaid"}.

tasks.title: Store a note document
tasks.instruction: In the 'reports' collection, store a document with content 'Kickoff complete.' and metadata {"category": "note", "status": "open"}.

tasks.title: Store a contact document
tasks.instruction: In the 'reports' collection, store a document with content 'Primary contact: Ada — [email protected].' and metadata {"category": "contact", "status": "active"}.

tasks.title: Verify API credentials (auth)
tasks.instruction: Following ONLY the Authentication section of the overview, authenticate against the API, then make one authenticated request that reads the 'workspace' collection and report the total number of documents it contains. If the server rejects your credentials, say so.

tasks.title: Count all documents
tasks.instruction: Report the total number of documents in the 'workspace' collection.

tasks.title: Read the first page
tasks.instruction: List the 'workspace' collection with a page size (limit) of 5 and report how many documents you received in that page.

tasks.title: Read a smaller page
tasks.instruction: List the 'workspace' collection with a page size (limit) of 3 and report how many documents you received in that page.

tasks.title: Count contacts (metadata filter)
tasks.instruction: Report how many documents in the 'workspace' collection have metadata category equal to 'contact'. Use the API to answer precisely.

tasks.title: Paginate every document
tasks.instruction: Retrieve EVERY document in the 'workspace' collection across all pages and report the total count of distinct document IDs you collected.
